title: 你假期去哪儿了？
pinyin: Nǐ jià qī qù nǎr le?
titleTranslation_en: Where did you go on vacation?
description_uz: «Ta'tilda qayerga bording?» — ta'til taassurotlari haqida ikki do'stning suhbati. Bu dialog qayerga borganini so'rash, ob-havo, kim bilan borgani, necha kun qolgani va dengizda suzish haqida gaplashishni mashq qiladi. Sayohat mavzusidagi foydali so'zlar — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Куда ты ездил на каникулах?» — разговор двух друзей о впечатлениях от отдыха. Диалог тренирует, как спросить, куда человек ездил, обсудить погоду, с кем он был, сколько дней отдыхал и купание в море. Полезная лексика на тему путешествий — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Where did you go on vacation?» — two friends chatting about their holiday. This dialogue practices asking where someone went, talking about the weather, who they went with, how many days they stayed, and swimming at the sea. Useful travel vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ jià qī qù nǎr le?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where did you go on vacation?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎi biān tiān qì zěn me yàng?
sentences.text_translation_en: How was the weather at the seaside?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo, tiān tiān dōu shì qíng tiān.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi, har kuni ochiq havo edi.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great — it was sunny every day.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hé jiā rén yì qǐ qù de.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ men wán le jǐ tiān?
sentences.text_translation_en: How many days did you spend there?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: Were there many people at the seaside?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hěn duō, dàn shì hǎi shuǐ hěn gān jìng.
sentences.text_translation: Ko'p edi, lekin dengiz suvi juda toza edi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Много, но морская вода была очень чистой.
sentences.text_translation_en: A lot, but the sea water was very clean.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Yóu le, shuǐ hěn liáng, hěn shū fu.
sentences.text_translation: Suzdim, suv salqin va juda yoqimli edi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Плавал — вода была прохладной и приятной.
sentences.text_translation_en: I did — the water was cool and really nice.
sentences.speaker: B
